# User Wiki
Last Updated: 2026-04-22T06:34:02.810Z

## Identity
- name: Gandrath Sai Eshwar
- nickname: Sai Eshwar
- dob: 1999-08-05
- gender: Male
- location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

## Communication Preferences

## Emotional Patterns

## Stress Triggers

## Joy Triggers

## Languages
- HTML
- CSS
- JavaScript
- Go

## Skills

## Education

## Work And Organizations

## Projects
- One-page calorie-calculating website (metric: cm/kg, BMR-based)
- Portfolio website for job applications (to be populated from user's resume)
- Local single-user wiki web app (wiki-app/) — zero-dependency Node server, frontend files (public/index.html, app.js, styles.css), pages stored as Markdown under wiki-app/data/wiki/, runs via node wiki-app/server.js (default port 3001)
- Calculator website — add sin and cos functions and assign distinct colors to each numeric button (0–9); update features on the existing calculator site

## Interests And Hobbies
- Following current IPL match details
- Reading mixed India news headlines

## People

## Contacts

## Places And Addresses

## Achievements

## Durable Facts
- User has multiple resumes on their local machine and asked the assistant to pick any for parsing

## Personal Preferences
- Prefer metric units (cm/kg) for calorie calculations
- Use BMR (Mifflin–St Jeor) for calorie/BMR calculation
- Prefer a simple one-page website design
- Prefer the personal wiki app to be local and single-user (no cloud hosting)

## Constraints And Dislikes

## Important Dates

## Unverified Or Needs Confirmation
